## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The defect is reproduced or reasonably isolated.
- [ ] The fix stays within the affected behavior and does not change public contracts unless explicitly required.
- [ ] Verification commands are documented.
- [ ] No secrets or environment-specific values are added.
